property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-21.0.9.10-hotspot\bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Python314\Scripts\;C:\Python314\;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\mingw64\bin;C:\Program Files\Microsoft SQL Server\150\Tools\Binn\;D:\Programs\GIT\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey\bin;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;D:\Programs\apache-maven-3.9.14-bin\apache-maven-3.9.14\bin;C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Program Files\Apache\maven\apache-maven-3.9.x\bin;C:\Program Files\Abache\maven\apache-maven-3.9.11\bin;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;.
